purpose: Benchmark profile catalog for the cjfake-backed read and write suites

cases.description: Real-world medium-size dataset with two geometries per object and parent-child links
Large real-world dataset dominated by geometry flattening and vertex import
Large MultiSurface payload with no relation graph or attribute tree
cases.intent: Favor serde_cityjson by maximizing geometry flattening and minimizing object normalization

cases.description: Large vertex pool with very little object-level normalization
cases.intent: Isolate root vertex transform and import cost

cases.description: Deep nested attributes with minimal geometry work
cases.intent: Stress recursive attribute conversion and backend boxing

cases.description: Dense parent-child graph with small geometry payloads
cases.intent: Stress relation resolution after CityObjects import

cases.description: Solid-heavy geometry that exercises nested boundary flattening
cases.intent: Stress the flat boundary parser and stored geometry construction

cases.description: Mixed geometry and normalization workload that is smaller but denser
cases.intent: Show a case where the generic DOM baseline remains competitive

cases.description: Serializer-heavy case with materials, textures, templates, and semantics
cases.intent: Exercise serializer validation and appearance/theme output
